text:
(In reply to Dmitry Petrov from comment #9)

I need a porters commit bit. :)  I'll reach out to someone else I know about this.  

I also got this update to 6.3.3, and running in a production environment  - backing a website that does 50-100k/req/day (unsure on the keydb load).

I had to back off mutli-master and active-active, as it had issues in under production load.
